seo.title: Temporary Staffing Solutions London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing delivers rapid, CQC-compliant temporary staffing solutions across London for care homes, NHS facilities, supported living, and private healthcare settings.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing provides rapid, reliable temporary staffing solutions for care homes, supported living and healthcare settings across Greater London.
fields.heading: Temporary Staffing Solutions in London
fields.image_alt: Temporary care staff team on shift in a London care home

fields.body:
Staffing gaps rarely arrive at a convenient time. A sudden absence, a busy season or a period of recruitment can leave a service short at short notice. Vigil Care Staffing provides temporary staffing solutions for care homes, nursing homes, supported living services and healthcare settings across Greater London.

We supply pre-vetted healthcare assistants, support workers and healthcare cleaners for single shifts, block bookings and longer cover. Each worker is matched to your setting and to the needs of the people you support, so temporary cover never means a drop in standards.

Vigil Care Staffing is a staffing supplier rather than a regulated care provider. Our role is to keep your service safely staffed with dependable people who are ready to work from their first shift.
fields.heading: Temporary staffing that keeps your service covered

items.body: We draw on a local pool of available, pre-vetted staff to fill short-notice and same-day gaps quickly, so your rota stays safely covered.
items.title: Rapid response

items.body: Book a single shift, a block of shifts or ongoing cover. Arrangements flex around your rota and change as your needs do.
items.title: Flexible solutions

items.body: Every worker is DBS-checked, reference-verified and confirmed eligible to work before being placed with your service.
items.title: Pre-vetted professionals

items.body: We match staff to your setting and standards, so temporary cover maintains continuity of care rather than disrupting it.
items.title: Consistent quality

items.body: Our team coordinates cover across days, nights and weekends whenever your service needs support.
items.title: Round-the-clock availability

items.body: We manage vetting, training records and payroll for the staff we supply, easing the load on your managers.
items.title: Reduced admin

fields.body:
Every worker we supply completes an enhanced DBS check, right-to-work verification and reference checks before their first shift. We confirm mandatory training in safeguarding, moving and handling and infection control, and keep records current through ongoing professional development.

Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process designed to support your own safe-staffing evidence. Because our staff are directly employed, responsibility for their vetting and conduct stays with us throughout every placement.
fields.heading: Vetting and compliance at the core

items.a: We provide temporary staffing across Greater London. Share your location and the roles you need and we will confirm availability in your area.
We supply temporary healthcare assistants, support workers and healthcare cleaners, matched to your setting and requirements.
We keep a local pool of pre-vetted staff and respond quickly to short-notice and same-day requests, always confirming what we can cover.
items.q: How quickly can you provide cover?

items.a: Every temporary worker is enhanced-DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and reference-checked, with mandatory training confirmed before they start.
items.q: What vetting do your temporary staff have?

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance

fields.sub: Tell us the roles and shifts you need covered and we will match pre-vetted staff to your service across Greater London.
fields.heading: Need temporary staff at short notice?
